mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT (MNO, RNO, RCNT) VALUES (#{mno}, #{rno}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE RCNT = RCNT + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MDELETEYN = 'N' WHERE MNO = #{mno} AND RCNT >= 5
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTR(RNO, 10) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM REPORT

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.MNO = M.MNO WHERE 1=1
AND M.MID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword}, '%')
SELECT RCNT FROM REPORT WHERE MNO = #{mno}
